# Fable Odyssey

Official website: https://fableodyssey.com

Fable Odyssey is a collection of original literary fiction, essays, and creative writing by the author Fluke.

## Website

- [Home](https://fableodyssey.com/)
- [Stories](https://fableodyssey.com/stories/)
- [About](https://fableodyssey.com/about/)
- [Contact](https://fableodyssey.com/contact/)

## AI Usage Policy

The content on this website is protected by copyright.

Reading and indexing this website for search, navigation, and citation is permitted.

Using the site's content to train, fine-tune, or improve AI or machine learning models is not permitted without prior written permission from the copyright holder.

For licensing or permissions, please contact the website owner through the Contact page.
